mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rating_levels WHERE deleted = 0 AND rating_rule_id = #{ratingRuleId} ORDER BY level_order ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO rating_levels ( id, rating_rule_id, level_name, level_code, level_order, min_percent, max_percent, min_score, max_score, level_color, level_icon, reward_points, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.ratingRuleId}, #{item.levelName}, #{item.levelCode}, #{item.levelOrder}, #{item.minPercent}, #{item.maxPercent}, #{item.minScore}, #{item.maxScore}, #{item.levelColor}, #{item.levelIcon}, #{item.rewardPoints}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE rating_levels SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE rating_rule_id = #{ratingRuleId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rating_levels WHERE rating_rule_id = #{ratingRuleId} AND deleted = 0
